# Copilot Memory — Architecture Decisions

Key decisions made during development. These override `lessons.md` — if there's a conflict,
the decision recorded here is authoritative.

Edit this file manually to record intentional architectural choices.

## Decision Log

<!-- Format:
### YYYY-MM-DD — Decision Title

**Trade-offs:** What was given up
